import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_find_first_in_sorted_with_duplicates():
    """Test value not found when target is less than all elements.

    The bug: lo <= hi causes infinite loop when target < all elements.
    When lo == mid (due to narrowing), hi = mid leaves lo unchanged,
    so mid never advances and we loop forever.
    """
    result = source.find_first_in_sorted([5, 5, 5], 4)
    assert result == -1
